violations.description: Preventing contamination from equipment, utensils, and wiping cloths. — --Cloth for wiping food spills was not stored in sanitizing solution (at proper concentration) between uses. Service Area Sanitation bucket was clean but tested at 100 ppm Quat.
Clean-in-place (CIP) equipment - Design and construction. — --Nonfood contact surface of clean in place equipment was not cleaned properly. The floor of reach in freezer has build up of crumbs.
Ventilation hood systems - Design and construction. — --Ventilation hood system was not designed and/or maintained properly. Hoods show signs of grease build up.

Storage and handling of maintenance items. — --Wet-use maintenance items, such as mops, were not placed in a position that allows proper air-drying. Mop found stored in mop bucket with mop head unable to air dry.
